mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dept ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept (parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, leader_id, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{deptCode}, #{leaderId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET parent_id=#{parentId}, dept_name=#{deptName}, dept_code=#{deptCode}, leader_id=#{leaderId}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
